Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**
Lax algebras on a pseudofunctor.
Morphisms are 2-cells which witness a certain diagram commutes. Since this 2-cell is not necessarily invertible, these are lax algebras.
We define it as a displayed bicategory. We also prove that the total category is univalent if the base is univalent.
*)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Import PseudoFunctor.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat. Import DispBicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispAdjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispUnivalence.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section Algebra.
  Context `{C : bicat}.
  Variable (F : psfunctor C C).

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
disp_cat_ob_mor C

F: psfunctor C C
disp_cat_ob_mor C

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
C → UU
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
(λ obd : C → UU,
 ∏ x y : C, obd x → obd y → C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU) ?pr1

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
C → UU
 exact (λ X, C⟦F X,X⟧).
    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
(λ obd : C → UU,
 ∏ x y : C, obd x → obd y → C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  (λ X : C, C ⟦ F X, X ⟧)
 
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
g: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
h: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
UU

      exact (invertible_2cell (f · h) (#F h · g)).
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
disp_cat_id_comp C alg_disp_cat

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
disp_cat_id_comp C alg_disp_cat

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (x : C) (xx : C ⟦ F x, x ⟧),
invertible_2cell (xx · id₁ x) (# F (id₁ x) · xx)
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (x y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : C ⟦ F x, x ⟧) (yy : C ⟦ F y, y ⟧)
(zz : C ⟦ F z, z ⟧),
invertible_2cell (xx · f) (# F f · yy)
→ invertible_2cell (yy · g) (# F g · zz)
  → invertible_2cell (xx · (f · g)) (# F (f · g) · zz)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (x : C) (xx : C ⟦ F x, x ⟧),
invertible_2cell (xx · id₁ x) (# F (id₁ x) · xx)
 
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X: C
f: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
invertible_2cell (f · id₁ X) (# F (id₁ X) · f)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X: C
f: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  ((runitor f • linvunitor f) • (psfunctor_id F X ▹ f))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X: C
f: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
is_invertible_2cell (psfunctor_id F X)

      exact (psfunctor_id F X).
    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (x y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : C ⟦ F x, x ⟧) (yy : C ⟦ F y, y ⟧)
(zz : C ⟦ F z, z ⟧),
invertible_2cell (xx · f) (# F f · yy)
→ invertible_2cell (yy · g) (# F g · zz)
  → invertible_2cell (xx · (f · g)) (# F (f · g) · zz)
 
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hZ: C ⟦ F Z, Z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
β: invertible_2cell (hY · g) (# F g · hZ)
invertible_2cell (hX · (f · g)) (# F (f · g) · hZ)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hZ: C ⟦ F Z, Z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
β: invertible_2cell (hY · g) (# F g · hZ)
is_invertible_2cell
  (((((lassociator hX f g • (α ▹ g))
      • rassociator (# F f) hY g) • (# F f ◃ β))
    • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) hZ)
   • (psfunctor_comp F f g ▹ hZ))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hZ: C ⟦ F Z, Z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
β: invertible_2cell (hY · g) (# F g · hZ)
is_invertible_2cell α
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hZ: C ⟦ F Z, Z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
β: invertible_2cell (hY · g) (# F g · hZ)
is_invertible_2cell β
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hZ: C ⟦ F Z, Z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
β: invertible_2cell (hY · g) (# F g · hZ)
is_invertible_2cell (psfunctor_comp F f g)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hZ: C ⟦ F Z, Z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
β: invertible_2cell (hY · g) (# F g · hZ)
is_invertible_2cell α
 exact α.
      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hZ: C ⟦ F Z, Z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
β: invertible_2cell (hY · g) (# F g · hZ)
is_invertible_2cell β
 exact β.
      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hZ: C ⟦ F Z, Z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
β: invertible_2cell (hY · g) (# F g · hZ)
is_invertible_2cell (psfunctor_comp F f g)
 exact (psfunctor_comp F f g).
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
disp_2cell_struct alg_disp_cat

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
disp_2cell_struct alg_disp_cat

    
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g
     → Map1Cells.Fmor x f ==> Map1Cells.Fmor x g)
    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>
       Map1Cells.Fmor x (id₁ X))
      × (∏ (X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
         Map1Cells.Fmor x f · Map1Cells.Fmor x g ==>
         Map1Cells.Fmor x (f · g)), is_psfunctor x
X, Y: C
f, g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
αf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
αg: invertible_2cell (hX · g) (# F g · hY)
UU

    exact ((hX ◃ α) • αg = αf • (##F α ▹ hY)).
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C

F: psfunctor C C
disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C

F: psfunctor C C
disp_cat_data C

F: psfunctor C C
(λ D : disp_cat_data C, disp_2cell_struct D) ?pr1

F: psfunctor C C
disp_cat_data C

 exact alg_disp_cat.

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
(λ D : disp_cat_data C, disp_2cell_struct D)
  (alg_disp_cat,, alg_disp_cat_id_comp)
 exact alg_disp_cat_2cell.
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
id_disp hX ;; hf ==>[ lunitor f] hf

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
id_disp hX ;; hf ==>[ lunitor f] hf

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
(hX ◃ lunitor f) • hf =
(((((lassociator hX (id₁ X) f
     • (((runitor hX • linvunitor hX)
         • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX)) ▹ f))
    • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
   • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
  • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY))
• (## F (lunitor f) ▹ hY)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
(hX ◃ lunitor f) • hf =
(((((lassociator hX (id₁ X) f
     • (((runitor hX ▹ f) • (linvunitor hX ▹ f))
        • (((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX) ▹ f)))
    • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
   • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
  • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY))
• (## F (lunitor f) ▹ hY)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
(hX ◃ lunitor f) • hf =
(((((((lassociator hX (id₁ X) f • (runitor hX ▹ f))
      • (linvunitor hX ▹ f))
     • (((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX) ▹ f))
    • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
   • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
  • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY))
• (## F (lunitor f) ▹ hY)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
(hX ◃ lunitor f) • hf =
(((((((lassociator hX (id₁ X) f • id₂ f ⋆⋆ runitor hX)
      • (linvunitor hX ▹ f))
     • (((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX) ▹ f))
    • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
   • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
  • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY))
• (## F (lunitor f) ▹ hY)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
(hX ◃ lunitor f) • hf =
((((((lunitor f ⋆⋆ id₂ hX • (linvunitor hX ▹ f))
     • (((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX) ▹ f))
    • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
   • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
  • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY))
• (## F (lunitor f) ▹ hY)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
(hX ◃ lunitor f) • hf =
(((((((hX ◃ lunitor f) • (linvunitor hX ▹ f))
     • (((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX) ▹ f))
    • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
   • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
  • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY))
• (## F (lunitor f) ▹ hY)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
(hX ◃ lunitor f) • hf =
(hX ◃ lunitor f)
• ((linvunitor hX ▹ f)
   • ((((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX) ▹ f)
      • (rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f
         • ((# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf)
            • (lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY
               • (((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f
                   ▹ hY) • (## F (lunitor f) ▹ hY)))))))

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
hf =
(linvunitor hX ▹ f)
• ((((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f
      • ((# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf)
         • (lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY
            • (((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY)
               • (## F (lunitor f) ▹ hY))))))

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
hf =
((((((linvunitor hX ▹ f)
     • (((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX) ▹ f))
    • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
   • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
  • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY))
• (## F (lunitor f) ▹ hY)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
is_invertible_2cell (## F (lunitor f) ▹ hY)
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
hf • ?Hε ^-1 =
(((((linvunitor hX ▹ f)
    • (((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX) ▹ f))
   • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
  • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
 • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
is_invertible_2cell (## F (lunitor f) ▹ hY)
 
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
is_invertible_2cell (## F (lunitor f))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
is_invertible_2cell (lunitor f)

      is_iso.
    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
hf
• (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
     (psfunctor_is_iso F
        (lunitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_lunitor f)))
  ^-1 =
(((((linvunitor hX ▹ f)
    • (((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX) ▹ f))
   • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
  • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
 • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
hf • (## F (linvunitor f) ▹ hY) =
(((((linvunitor hX ▹ f)
    • (((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX) ▹ f))
   • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
  • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
 • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
hf
• (((linvunitor (# F f) • (psfunctor_id F X ▹ # F f))
    • psfunctor_comp F (id₁ X) f) ▹ hY) =
(((((linvunitor hX ▹ f)
    • (((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX) ▹ f))
   • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
  • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
 • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
hf
• ((linvunitor (# F f)
    • ((psfunctor_id F X ▹ # F f)
       • psfunctor_comp F (id₁ X) f)) ▹ hY) =
(linvunitor hX ▹ f)
• ((((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f
      • ((# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf)
         • (lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY
            • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY)))))

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
hf
• ((linvunitor (# F f) ▹ hY)
   • (((psfunctor_id F X ▹ # F f) ▹ hY)
      • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ X) f ▹ hY))) =
(linvunitor hX ▹ f)
• ((((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX) ▹ f)
   • (rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f
      • ((# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf)
         • (lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY
            • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY)))))

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
((hf • (linvunitor (# F f) ▹ hY))
 • ((psfunctor_id F X ▹ # F f) ▹ hY))
• (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ X) f ▹ hY) =
(((((linvunitor hX ▹ f)
    • (((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX) ▹ f))
   • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
  • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
 • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY)

(hf • (linvunitor (# F f) ▹ hY))

((((linvunitor hX ▹ f)
   • (((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX) ▹ f))
  • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
 • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
• lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY

   • ((linvunitor (# F f) ▹ hY)

hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧

(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker f
   (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor hX)) ^-1
• (hf
   • ((linvunitor (# F f) ▹ hY)
      • ((psfunctor_id F X ▹ # F f) ▹ hY))) =

hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧

 • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX · f)) • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
rassociator (id₁ (F X)) hX f
• ((id₁ (F X) ◃ hf) • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ # F f · hY)) =
rassociator (id₁ (F X)) hX f
• (((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX · f) • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
(id₁ (F X) ◃ hf) • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ # F f · hY) =
((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX · f) • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
(id₁ (F X) ◃ hf) • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ # F f · hY) =
(id₁ (F X) ◃ hf) • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ # F f · hY)

    reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f ==> # F f · hY
(hX ◃ runitor f) • hf =
((lassociator hX f (id₁ Y) • (hf ▹ id₁ Y))
 • rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y))
• (# F f ◃ runitor hY)

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f ==> # F f · hY
(hX ◃ runitor f) • hf =
((lassociator hX f (id₁ Y) • (hf ▹ id₁ Y))
 • rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y))
• (# F f ◃ runitor hY)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f ==> # F f · hY
is_invertible_2cell (hX ◃ runitor f)

hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f ==> # F f · hY
hf =
?Hε ^-1
• (((lassociator hX f (id₁ Y) • (hf ▹ id₁ Y))
    • rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y))
   • (# F f ◃ runitor hY))

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f ==> # F f · hY
is_invertible_2cell (hX ◃ runitor f)
 is_iso. 
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f ==> # F f · hY
hf =
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker hX
   (is_invertible_2cell_runitor f)) ^-1
• (((lassociator hX f (id₁ Y) • (hf ▹ id₁ Y))
    • rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y))
   • (# F f ◃ runitor hY))

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f ==> # F f · hY
hf =
(hX ◃ rinvunitor f)
• (((lassociator hX f (id₁ Y) • (hf ▹ id₁ Y))
    • rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y))
   • (# F f ◃ runitor hY))

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f ==> # F f · hY
hf =
(hX ◃ rinvunitor f)
• (lassociator hX f (id₁ Y)
   • ((hf ▹ id₁ Y)
      • (rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y)
         • (# F f ◃ runitor hY))))

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f ==> # F f · hY
hf =
(hX ◃ rinvunitor f)
• (lassociator hX f (id₁ Y)
   • ((hf ▹ id₁ Y) • runitor (# F f · hY)))

 • (hf ▹ id₁ Y)) • runitor (# F f · hY)

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C

f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧

f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧

f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧

F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX · f ==> # F f · hY
hf = hf

    reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hf ;; id_disp hY ==>[ runitor f] hf

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧

hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
(hX ◃ runitor f) • hf =
(((((lassociator hX f (id₁ Y) • (hf ▹ id₁ Y))
    • rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y))
   • (# F f
      ◃ ((runitor hY • linvunitor hY)
         • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY))))
  • lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Y f (id₁ Y) ▹ hY))
• (## F (runitor f) ▹ hY)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
((lassociator hX f (id₁ Y) • (hf ▹ id₁ Y))
 • rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y))
• (# F f ◃ runitor hY) =
(((((lassociator hX f (id₁ Y) • (hf ▹ id₁ Y))
    • rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y))
   • (# F f
      ◃ ((runitor hY • linvunitor hY)
         • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY))))
  • lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Y f (id₁ Y) ▹ hY))
• (## F (runitor f) ▹ hY)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
((lassociator hX f (id₁ Y) • (hf ▹ id₁ Y))
 • rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y))
• (# F f ◃ runitor hY) =
(((((lassociator hX f (id₁ Y) • (hf ▹ id₁ Y))
    • rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y))
   • (((# F f ◃ runitor hY) • (# F f ◃ linvunitor hY))
      • (# F f ◃ ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY))))
  • lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Y f (id₁ Y) ▹ hY))
• (## F (runitor f) ▹ hY)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
lassociator hX f (id₁ Y)
• ((hf ▹ id₁ Y)
   • (rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y)
      • (# F f ◃ runitor hY))) =
lassociator hX f (id₁ Y)
• ((hf ▹ id₁ Y)
   • (rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y)
      • ((# F f ◃ runitor hY)
         • ((# F f ◃ linvunitor hY)
            • ((# F f ◃ ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY))
               • (lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY
                  • (((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Y f (id₁ Y)
                      ▹ hY) • (## F (runitor f) ▹ hY))))))))

f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧

hf: hX -->[ f] hY
(hf ▹ id₁ Y)
• (rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y)
   • (# F f ◃ runitor hY)) =
(hf ▹ id₁ Y)
• (rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y)
   • ((# F f ◃ runitor hY)
      • ((# F f ◃ linvunitor hY)
         • ((# F f ◃ ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY))
            • (lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY
               • (((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Y f (id₁ Y)
                   ▹ hY) • (## F (runitor f) ▹ hY)))))))

rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y) • (# F f ◃ runitor hY) =
rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y)
• ((# F f ◃ runitor hY)
   • ((# F f ◃ linvunitor hY)
      • ((# F f ◃ ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY))
         • (lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY
            • (((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Y f (id₁ Y) ▹ hY)
               • (## F (runitor f) ▹ hY))))))

f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧

  • (# F f ◃ ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY)))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY)

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
(# F f ◃ runitor hY)
• (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
     (psfunctor_is_iso F
        (runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f)))
  ^-1 =
((((# F f ◃ runitor hY) • (# F f ◃ linvunitor hY))
  • (# F f ◃ ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY)))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY)
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Y f (id₁ Y) ▹ hY)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
(# F f ◃ runitor hY) • (## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ hY) =
((((# F f ◃ runitor hY) • (# F f ◃ linvunitor hY))
  • (# F f ◃ ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY)))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY)
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Y f (id₁ Y) ▹ hY)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
(# F f ◃ runitor hY) • (## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ hY) =
(# F f ◃ runitor hY)
• ((# F f ◃ linvunitor hY)
   • ((# F f ◃ ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY))
      • (lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY
         • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Y f (id₁ Y) ▹ hY))))

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ hY =
(# F f ◃ linvunitor hY)
• ((# F f ◃ ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY))
   • (lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY
      • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Y f (id₁ Y) ▹ hY)))

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
((rinvunitor (# F f) • (# F f ◃ psfunctor_id F Y))
 • psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ Y)) ▹ hY =
(# F f ◃ linvunitor hY)
• ((# F f ◃ ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY))
   • (lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY
      • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Y f (id₁ Y) ▹ hY)))

((rinvunitor (# F f) ▹ hY)
 • ((# F f ◃ psfunctor_id F Y) ▹ hY))
• (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ Y) ▹ hY) =
(# F f ◃ linvunitor hY)
• ((# F f ◃ ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY))
   • (lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY
      • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Y f (id₁ Y) ▹ hY)))

 • ((# F f ◃ psfunctor_id F Y) ▹ hY))
• (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ Y) ▹ hY) =
(((# F f ◃ linvunitor hY)
  • (# F f ◃ ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY)))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY)
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Y f (id₁ Y) ▹ hY)

• (lassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) hY
   • ((# F f ◃ (pr122 (pr1 F)) Y) ▹ hY))

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX -->[ f] hY

• lassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) hY

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
linvunitor hY ⋆⋆ id₂ (# F f)
• lassociator (# F f) (id₁ (F Y)) hY =
id₂ hY ⋆⋆ rinvunitor (# F f)

    apply triangle_l_inv.
  Qed.

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
W, X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ W, X ⟧
g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
h: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
hW: disp_alg_prebicat_1 W
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hW -->[ f] hX
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hY -->[ h] hZ
(hf ;; hg)%mor_disp ;; hh ==>[
rassociator f g h] hf ;; (hg ;; hh)%mor_disp

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
W, X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ W, X ⟧
g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
h: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
hW: disp_alg_prebicat_1 W
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hW -->[ f] hX
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hY -->[ h] hZ
(hf ;; hg)%mor_disp ;; hh ==>[
rassociator f g h] hf ;; (hg ;; hh)%mor_disp

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
W, X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ W, X ⟧
g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
h: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
hW: disp_alg_prebicat_1 W
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hW -->[ f] hX
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hY -->[ h] hZ
(hW ◃ rassociator f g h)
• (((((lassociator hW f (g · h) • (hf ▹ g · h))
      • rassociator (# F f) hX (g · h))
     • (# F f
        ◃ (((((lassociator hX g h • (hg ▹ h))
              • rassociator (# F g) hY h)
             • (# F g ◃ hh))
            • lassociator (# F g) (# F h) hZ)
           • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z g h ▹ hZ))))
    • lassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) hZ)
   • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Z f (g · h) ▹ hZ)) =
(((((lassociator hW (f · g) h
     • ((((((lassociator hW f g • (hf ▹ g))
            • rassociator (# F f) hX g) • (# F f ◃ hg))
          • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) hY)
         • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ hY)) ▹ h))
    • rassociator (# F (f · g)) hY h)
   • (# F (f · g) ◃ hh))
  • lassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) hZ)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W Y Z (f · g) h ▹ hZ))
• (## F (rassociator f g h) ▹ hZ)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
W, X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ W, X ⟧
g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
h: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧

hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z

hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hY -->[ h] hZ

(lassociator hW (f · g) h • (lassociator hW f g ▹ h))
• rassociator (hW · f) g h

X0: (hW ◃ rassociator f g h)
• lassociator hW f (g · h) =
(lassociator hW (f · g) h
 • (lassociator hW f g ▹ h))
• rassociator (hW · f) g h
(hW ◃ rassociator f g h)
• (((((lassociator hW f (g · h) • (hf ▹ g · h))
      • rassociator (# F f) hX (g · h))
     • (# F f
        ◃ (((((lassociator hX g h • (hg ▹ h))
              • rassociator (# F g) hY h)
             • (# F g ◃ hh))
            • lassociator (# F g) (# F h) hZ)
           • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z g h ▹ hZ))))
    • lassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) hZ)
   • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Z f (g · h) ▹ hZ)) =
(((((lassociator hW (f · g) h
     • ((((((lassociator hW f g • (hf ▹ g))
            • rassociator (# F f) hX g) • (# F f ◃ hg))
          • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) hY)
         • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ hY)) ▹ h))
    • rassociator (# F (f · g)) hY h)
   • (# F (f · g) ◃ hh))
  • lassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) hZ)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W Y Z (f · g) h ▹ hZ))
• (## F (rassociator f g h) ▹ hZ)

   • ((hf ▹ g · h)

  • (# F (f · g) ◃ hh))

• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W Y Z (f · g) h ▹ hZ)

rassociator (# F f) hX (g · h)
• (((# F f ◃ lassociator hX g h)
    • (# F f
       ◃ ((hg ▹ h)
          • (rassociator (# F g) hY h • (# F g ◃ hh)))))
   • ((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · hZ)
       • lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) hZ)
      • (((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ # F h) ▹ hZ))) =
?Hε ^-1
• ((rassociator (# F f) hX g ▹ h)
   • (((# F f ◃ hg) ▹ h)
      • ((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) hY ▹ h)
         • ((((((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ hY) ▹ h)
              • rassociator (# F (f · g)) hY h)
             • (# F (f · g) ◃ hh))
            • lassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) hZ))))

               • ((((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ hY)

                  • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) hY h
                     • ((# F (f · g) ◃ hh)
                        • lassociator (# F (f · g))
                            (# F h) hZ))))))))

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
W, X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ W, X ⟧
g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
h: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
hW: disp_alg_prebicat_1 W
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hW -->[ f] hX
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hY -->[ h] hZ
X0: (hW ◃ rassociator f g h)
• lassociator hW f (g · h) =
(lassociator hW (f · g) h
 • (lassociator hW f g ▹ h))
• rassociator (hW · f) g h
p: lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · hZ)
• lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) hZ =
((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) (# F h) hZ)
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) hZ)
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ hZ)
(((# F f ◃ rassociator hX g h)
  • lassociator (# F f) hX (g · h))
 • lassociator (# F f · hX) g h)
• (rassociator (# F f) hX g ▹ h) =
lassociator (# F f) (hX · g) h

F: psfunctor C C

hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hW -->[ f] hX
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hY -->[ h] hZ
X0: (hW ◃ rassociator f g h)
• lassociator hW f (g · h) =
(lassociator hW (f · g) h
 • (lassociator hW f g ▹ h))
• rassociator (hW · f) g h
p: lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · hZ)
• lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) hZ =
((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) (# F h) hZ)
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) hZ)
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ hZ)
(# F f ◃ rassociator hX g h)
• (lassociator (# F f) hX (g · h)
   • (lassociator (# F f · hX) g h
      • (rassociator (# F f) hX g ▹ h))) =
lassociator (# F f) (hX · g) h

• lassociator hW f (g · h) =

 • (lassociator hW f g ▹ h))
• rassociator (hW · f) g h
p: lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · hZ)
• lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) hZ =

• ((lassociator (# F f) hX (g · h)
    • lassociator (# F f · hX) g h)
   • (rassociator (# F f) hX g ▹ h)) =
lassociator (# F f) (hX · g) h

      reflexivity.

g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧

hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hY -->[ h] hZ

• lassociator hW f (g · h) =

 • (lassociator hW f g ▹ h))
• rassociator (hW · f) g h
p: lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · hZ)
• lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) hZ =
((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) (# F h) hZ)
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) hZ)
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ hZ)
X1: (((# F f ◃ rassociator hX g h)
  • lassociator (# F f) hX (g · h))
 • lassociator (# F f · hX) g h)
• (rassociator (# F f) hX g ▹ h) =
lassociator (# F f) (hX · g) h
(# F f
 ◃ ((hg ▹ h)
    • (rassociator (# F g) hY h • (# F g ◃ hh))))
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · hZ)
   • (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) hZ
      • (((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ # F h) ▹ hZ))) =
(# F f ◃ rassociator hX g h)
• (lassociator (# F f) hX (g · h)
   • (lassociator (# F f · hX) g h
      • ((rassociator (# F f) hX g ▹ h)
         • (((# F f ◃ hg) ▹ h)
            • ((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) hY ▹ h)
               • ((((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ hY)
                   ▹ h)
                  • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) hY h
                     • ((# F (f · g) ◃ hh)
                        • lassociator (# F (f · g))
                            (# F h) hZ))))))))

(((# F f
   ◃ (((hg ▹ h) • rassociator (# F g) hY h)

  • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · hZ))

     • ((# F f ◃ hg) ▹ h))
    • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g) hY ▹ h))

  • rassociator (# F (f · g)) hY h)
 • (# F (f · g) ◃ hh))

hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hW -->[ f] hX
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hY -->[ h] hZ
X0: (hW ◃ rassociator f g h)
• lassociator hW f (g · h) =
(lassociator hW (f · g) h
 • (lassociator hW f g ▹ h))
• rassociator (hW · f) g h
p: lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · hZ)
• lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) hZ =
((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) (# F h) hZ)
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) hZ)
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ hZ)
X1: (((# F f ◃ rassociator hX g h)
  • lassociator (# F f) hX (g · h))
 • lassociator (# F f · hX) g h)
• (rassociator (# F f) hX g ▹ h) =
lassociator (# F f) (hX · g) h
is_invertible_2cell
  (lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (hY · h))
 is_iso. 
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
W, X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ W, X ⟧
g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
h: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
hW: disp_alg_prebicat_1 W
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hW -->[ f] hX
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hY -->[ h] hZ
X0: (hW ◃ rassociator f g h)
• lassociator hW f (g · h) =
(lassociator hW (f · g) h
 • (lassociator hW f g ▹ h))
• rassociator (hW · f) g h
p: lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · hZ)
• lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) hZ =
((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) (# F h) hZ)
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) hZ)
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ hZ)
X1: (((# F f ◃ rassociator hX g h)
  • lassociator (# F f) hX (g · h))
 • lassociator (# F f · hX) g h)
• (rassociator (# F f) hX g ▹ h) =
lassociator (# F f) (hX · g) h
(# F f · # F g ◃ hh)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) hZ
   • (((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ # F h) ▹ hZ)) =
(is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (# F f) (# F g)
   (hY · h)) ^-1
• ((is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F f)
      (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator (# F g) hY h))
   ^-1
   • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g · hY) h
      • ((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) hY ▹ h)
         • ((((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ hY) ▹ h)
            • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) hY h
               • ((# F (f · g) ◃ hh)
                  • lassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h)
                      hZ))))))

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
W, X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ W, X ⟧
g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
h: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
hW: disp_alg_prebicat_1 W
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hW -->[ f] hX
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hY -->[ h] hZ
X0: (hW ◃ rassociator f g h)
• lassociator hW f (g · h) =
(lassociator hW (f · g) h
 • (lassociator hW f g ▹ h))
• rassociator (hW · f) g h
p: lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · hZ)
• lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) hZ =
((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) (# F h) hZ)
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) hZ)
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ hZ)
X1: (((# F f ◃ rassociator hX g h)
  • lassociator (# F f) hX (g · h))
 • lassociator (# F f · hX) g h)
• (rassociator (# F f) hX g ▹ h) =
lassociator (# F f) (hX · g) h
(# F f · # F g ◃ hh)
• (lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) hZ
   • (((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ # F h) ▹ hZ)) =
rassociator (# F f) (# F g) (hY · h)
• ((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) hY h)
   • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g · hY) h
      • ((lassociator (# F f) (# F g) hY ▹ h)
         • ((((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ hY) ▹ h)
            • (rassociator (# F (f · g)) hY h
               • ((# F (f · g) ◃ hh)
                  • lassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h)
                      hZ))))))

hg: hX -->[ g] hY

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
W, X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ W, X ⟧
g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
h: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧

hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hW -->[ f] hX
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hY -->[ h] hZ
X0: (hW ◃ rassociator f g h)
• lassociator hW f (g · h) =

 • (lassociator hW f g ▹ h))
• rassociator (hW · f) g h
p: lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · hZ)
• lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) hZ =

 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) hZ)

 • lassociator (# F f · hX) g h)
• (rassociator (# F f) hX g ▹ h) =
lassociator (# F f) (hX · g) h
rassociator (# F f) (# F g) (hY · h)
• (lassociator (# F g) hY h ⋆⋆ id₂ (# F f)
   • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g · hY) h
      • id₂ h ⋆⋆ lassociator (# F f) (# F g) hY)) =
lassociator (# F f · # F g) hY h

(rassociator (# F f) (# F g) (hY · h)

id₂ (# F f · # F g · (hY · h))
• lassociator (# F f · # F g) hY h =

      apply id2_left.

((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) (# F h) hZ)
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) hZ)
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ hZ)
X1: (((# F f ◃ rassociator hX g h)
  • lassociator (# F f) hX (g · h))
 • lassociator (# F f · hX) g h)
• (rassociator (# F f) hX g ▹ h) =
lassociator (# F f) (hX · g) h
X2: ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) (hY · h)
  • (# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) hY h))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g · hY) h)
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g) hY ▹ h) =
lassociator (# F f · # F g) hY h
((# F f · # F g ◃ hh)
 • lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) hZ)
• (((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ # F h) ▹ hZ) =
(((lassociator (# F f · # F g) hY h
   • (((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ hY) ▹ h))
  • rassociator (# F (f · g)) hY h)
 • (# F (f · g) ◃ hh))
• lassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) hZ

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
W, X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ W, X ⟧
g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
h: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
hW: disp_alg_prebicat_1 W
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hW -->[ f] hX
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hY -->[ h] hZ
X0: (hW ◃ rassociator f g h)
• lassociator hW f (g · h) =
(lassociator hW (f · g) h
 • (lassociator hW f g ▹ h))
• rassociator (hW · f) g h
p: lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · hZ)
• lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) hZ =
((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) (# F h) hZ)
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) hZ)
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ hZ)
X1: (((# F f ◃ rassociator hX g h)
  • lassociator (# F f) hX (g · h))
 • lassociator (# F f · hX) g h)
• (rassociator (# F f) hX g ▹ h) =
lassociator (# F f) (hX · g) h
X2: ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) (hY · h)
  • (# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) hY h))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g · hY) h)
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g) hY ▹ h) =
lassociator (# F f · # F g) hY h
(# F f · # F g ◃ hh)
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ # F h · hZ) =
((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ hY · h)
• (# F (f · g) ◃ hh)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
W, X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ W, X ⟧
g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
h: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
hW: disp_alg_prebicat_1 W
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hW -->[ f] hX
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hY -->[ h] hZ
X0: (hW ◃ rassociator f g h)
• lassociator hW f (g · h) =
(lassociator hW (f · g) h
 • (lassociator hW f g ▹ h))
• rassociator (hW · f) g h
p: lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h · hZ)
• lassociator (# F f · # F g) (# F h) hZ =
((# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) (# F h) hZ)
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g · # F h) hZ)
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g) (# F h) ▹ hZ)
X1: (((# F f ◃ rassociator hX g h)
  • lassociator (# F f) hX (g · h))
 • lassociator (# F f · hX) g h)
• (rassociator (# F f) hX g ▹ h) =
lassociator (# F f) (hX · g) h
X2: ((rassociator (# F f) (# F g) (hY · h)
  • (# F f ◃ lassociator (# F g) hY h))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g · hY) h)
• (lassociator (# F f) (# F g) hY ▹ h) =
lassociator (# F f · # F g) hY h
(# F f · # F g ◃ hh)
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ # F h · hZ) =
(# F f · # F g ◃ hh)
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ # F h · hZ)

    reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
disp_prebicat_ops disp_alg_prebicat_1

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
disp_prebicat_ops disp_alg_prebicat_1

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ id₂ f] f'
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
id_disp x ;; f' ==>[ lunitor f] f'
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ;; id_disp y ==>[ runitor f] f'
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ linvunitor f] id_disp x ;; f'
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ rinvunitor f] f' ;; id_disp y
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (w : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 c)
(z : disp_alg_prebicat_1 d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z),
(ff ;; gg)%mor_disp ;; hh ==>[
rassociator f g h] ff ;; (gg ;; hh)%mor_disp
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (w : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 c)
(z : disp_alg_prebicat_1 d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z),
ff ;; (gg ;; hh)%mor_disp ==>[
lassociator f g h] (ff ;; gg)%mor_disp ;; hh
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b : C) (f g h : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (r : f ==> g)
(s : g ==> h) (x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : x -->[ h] y),
ff ==>[ r] gg → gg ==>[ s] hh → ff ==>[ r • s] hh
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g1 g2 : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : g1 ==> g2) (x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b)
(z : disp_alg_prebicat_1 c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg1 : y -->[ g1] z) (gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
gg1 ==>[ r] gg2 → ff ;; gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] ff ;; gg2
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b c : C) (f1 f2 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : f1 ==> f2) (x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b)
(z : disp_alg_prebicat_1 c) (ff1 : x -->[ f1] y)
(ff2 : x -->[ f2] y) (gg : y -->[ g] z),
ff1 ==>[ r] ff2 → ff1 ;; gg ==>[ r ▹ g] ff2 ;; gg

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ id₂ f] f'
 
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
α: hX -->[ f] hY
(hX ◃ id₂ f) • α = α • (## F (id₂ f) ▹ hY)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
α: hX -->[ f] hY
α = α • (## F (id₂ f) ▹ hY)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
α: hX -->[ f] hY
α = α

      reflexivity.
    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
id_disp x ;; f' ==>[ lunitor f] f'
 
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
id_disp hX ;; hf ==>[ lunitor f] hf

      exact (disp_alg_lunitor f hX hY hf).
    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ;; id_disp y ==>[ runitor f] f'
 
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hf ;; id_disp hY ==>[ runitor f] hf

      exact (disp_alg_runitor f hX hY hf).
    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ linvunitor f] id_disp x ;; f'
 
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
(hX ◃ linvunitor f)
• ((((((lassociator hX (id₁ X) f
        • (((runitor hX • linvunitor hX)
            • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX)) ▹ f))
       • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
      • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
     • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
    • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator hX
                    (id₁ X) f)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker f
                    (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                       (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                          (is_invertible_2cell_runitor
                             hX)
                          (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
                             hX))
                       (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                          hX ((pr122 F) X)))))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 (# F (id₁ X)) hX f))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F (id₁ X))
              hf))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (# F (id₁ X))
           (# F f) hY))
     (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
        ((pr222 F) X X Y (id₁ X) f))) =
hf • (## F (linvunitor f) ▹ hY)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
is_invertible_2cell (hX ◃ linvunitor f)
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
(((((lassociator hX (id₁ X) f
     • (((runitor hX • linvunitor hX)
         • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX)) ▹ f))
    • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
   • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
  • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY)),,
is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator hX
                 (id₁ X) f)
              (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker f
                 (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                    (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                       (is_invertible_2cell_runitor hX)
                       (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
                          hX))
                    (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hX
                       ((pr122 F) X)))))
           (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
              (# F (id₁ X)) hX f))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F (id₁ X)) hf))
     (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (# F (id₁ X))
        (# F f) hY))
  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
     ((pr222 F) X X Y (id₁ X) f)) =
?Hε ^-1 • (hf • (## F (linvunitor f) ▹ hY))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
is_invertible_2cell (hX ◃ linvunitor f)
 is_iso. 
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
(((((lassociator hX (id₁ X) f
     • (((runitor hX • linvunitor hX)
         • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX)) ▹ f))
    • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
   • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
  • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY)),,
is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator hX
                 (id₁ X) f)
              (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker f
                 (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                    (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                       (is_invertible_2cell_runitor hX)
                       (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
                          hX))
                    (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hX
                       ((pr122 F) X)))))
           (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
              (# F (id₁ X)) hX f))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F (id₁ X)) hf))
     (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (# F (id₁ X))
        (# F f) hY))
  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
     ((pr222 F) X X Y (id₁ X) f)) =
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker hX
   (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor f)) ^-1
• (hf • (## F (linvunitor f) ▹ hY))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
(((((lassociator hX (id₁ X) f
     • (((runitor hX • linvunitor hX)
         • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX)) ▹ f))
    • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
   • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
  • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY)),,
is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator hX
                 (id₁ X) f)
              (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker f
                 (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                    (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                       (is_invertible_2cell_runitor hX)
                       (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
                          hX))
                    (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hX
                       ((pr122 F) X)))))
           (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
              (# F (id₁ X)) hX f))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F (id₁ X)) hf))
     (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (# F (id₁ X))
        (# F f) hY))
  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
     ((pr222 F) X X Y (id₁ X) f)) =
((is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker hX
    (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor f)) ^-1 • hf)
• (## F (linvunitor f) ▹ hY)

hf: hX -->[ f] hY
((((((lassociator hX (id₁ X) f
      • (((runitor hX • linvunitor hX)
          • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX)) ▹ f))
     • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
    • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
   • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
  • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY)),,
 is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
   (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
      (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
         (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
            (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
               (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator hX

                           hX))

            hf))

   (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
      ((pr222 F) X X Y (id₁ X) f))) • ?Hε ^-1 =
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker hX
   (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor f)) ^-1 • hf

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
((((((lassociator hX (id₁ X) f
      • (((runitor hX • linvunitor hX)
          • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX)) ▹ f))
     • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
    • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
   • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
  • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY)),,
 is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
   (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
      (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
         (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
            (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
               (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator hX
                  (id₁ X) f)
               (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker f
                  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                        (is_invertible_2cell_runitor
                           hX)
                        (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
                           hX))
                     (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hX
                        ((pr122 F) X)))))
            (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
               (# F (id₁ X)) hX f))
         (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F (id₁ X))
            hf))
      (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (# F (id₁ X))
         (# F f) hY))
   (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
      ((pr222 F) X X Y (id₁ X) f)))
• (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
     (psfunctor_is_iso F
        (linvunitor f,,
         is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor f))) ^-1 =
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker hX
   (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor f)) ^-1 • hf

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker hX
   (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor f)) ^-1 • hf =
((((((lassociator hX (id₁ X) f
      • (((runitor hX • linvunitor hX)
          • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) X ▹ hX)) ▹ f))
     • rassociator (# F (id₁ X)) hX f)
    • (# F (id₁ X) ◃ hf))
   • lassociator (# F (id₁ X)) (# F f) hY)
  • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X X Y (id₁ X) f ▹ hY)),,
 is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
   (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
      (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
         (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
            (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
               (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator hX
                  (id₁ X) f)
               (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker f
                  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                        (is_invertible_2cell_runitor
                           hX)
                        (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor
                           hX))
                     (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hX
                        ((pr122 F) X)))))
            (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
               (# F (id₁ X)) hX f))
         (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F (id₁ X))
            hf))
      (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (# F (id₁ X))
         (# F f) hY))
   (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
      ((pr222 F) X X Y (id₁ X) f)))
• (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
     (psfunctor_is_iso F
        (linvunitor f,,
         is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor f))) ^-1

      exact (disp_alg_lunitor f hX hY hf).
    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b) (f' : x -->[ f] y),
f' ==>[ rinvunitor f] f' ;; id_disp y
 
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
(hX ◃ rinvunitor f)
• ((((((lassociator hX f (id₁ Y) • (hf ▹ id₁ Y))
       • rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y))
      • (# F f
         ◃ ((runitor hY • linvunitor hY)
            • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY))))
     • lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY)
    • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Y f (id₁ Y) ▹ hY)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator hX f
                    (id₁ Y))
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (id₁ Y)
                    hf))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator (# F f)
                 hY (id₁ Y)))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F f)
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                    (is_invertible_2cell_runitor hY)
                    (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor hY))
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
                    ((pr122 F) Y)))))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (# F f)
           (# F (id₁ Y)) hY))
     (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
        ((pr222 F) X Y Y f (id₁ Y)))) =
hf • (## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ hY)

              (id₁ Y)))

                 (is_invertible_2cell_runitor hY)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor hY))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
                 ((pr122 F) Y)))))
     (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (# F f)
        (# F (id₁ Y)) hY))
  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
     ((pr222 F) X Y Y f (id₁ Y))) =

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
(((((lassociator hX f (id₁ Y) • (hf ▹ id₁ Y))
    • rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y))
   • (# F f
      ◃ ((runitor hY • linvunitor hY)
         • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY))))
  • lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Y f (id₁ Y) ▹ hY)),,
is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator hX f
                 (id₁ Y))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker (id₁ Y) hf))
           (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator (# F f) hY
              (id₁ Y)))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F f)
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_runitor hY)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor hY))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
                 ((pr122 F) Y)))))
     (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (# F f)
        (# F (id₁ Y)) hY))
  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
     ((pr222 F) X Y Y f (id₁ Y))) =
((is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker hX
    (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor f)) ^-1 • hf)
• (## F (rinvunitor f) ▹ hY)

     • rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y))

               (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY

   (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
      ((pr222 F) X Y Y f (id₁ Y))))

     (psfunctor_is_iso F

(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker hX
   (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor f)) ^-1 • hf

F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
(((((lassociator hX f (id₁ Y) • (hf ▹ id₁ Y))
    • rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y))
   • (# F f
      ◃ ((runitor hY • linvunitor hY)
         • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY))))
  • lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Y f (id₁ Y) ▹ hY))

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C

f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧

(hX ◃ runitor f) • hf =
(((((lassociator hX f (id₁ Y) • (hf ▹ id₁ Y))
    • rassociator (# F f) hY (id₁ Y))
   • (# F f
      ◃ ((runitor hY • linvunitor hY)
         • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) Y ▹ hY))))
  • lassociator (# F f) (# F (id₁ Y)) hY)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Y f (id₁ Y) ▹ hY))
• (## F (runitor f) ▹ hY)

      exact (disp_alg_runitor f hX hY hf).
    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b c d : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : C ⟦ c, d ⟧) (w : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 c)
(z : disp_alg_prebicat_1 d) (ff : w -->[ f] x)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : y -->[ h] z),
(ff ;; gg)%mor_disp ;; hh ==>[
rassociator f g h] ff ;; (gg ;; hh)%mor_disp
 
C: bicat

f: C ⟦ W, X ⟧
g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
h: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧

hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z

hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hY -->[ h] hZ
(hf ;; hg)%mor_disp ;; hh ==>[
rassociator f g h] hf ;; (hg ;; hh)%mor_disp

      exact (disp_alg_lassociator hf hg hh).

(hW ◃ lassociator f g h)
• ((((((lassociator hW (f · g) h
        • ((((((lassociator hW f g • (...))
               • rassociator (# F f) hX g)
              • (# F f ◃ hg))
             • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) hY)
            • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ hY)) ▹ h))
       • rassociator (# F (f · g)) hY h)

     • lassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) hZ)
    • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W Y Z (f · g) h ▹ hZ)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator hW
                    (f · g) h)
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker h
                    (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                       (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                          (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                             (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

                                   (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                                      hW f g)
                                   (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker

                                (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                                   (# F f) hX g))
                             (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
                                (# F f) hg))
                          (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                             (# F f) (# F g) hY))
                       (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                          hY ((pr222 F) W X Y f g)))))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 (# F (f · g)) hY h))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F (f · g))
              hh))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (# F (f · g))
           (# F h) hZ))
     (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hZ
        ((pr222 F) W Y Z (f · g) h))) =
((((((lassociator hW f (g · h) • (hf ▹ g · h))
     • rassociator (# F f) hX (g · h))
    • (# F f
       ◃ (((((lassociator hX g h • (hg ▹ h))
             • rassociator (# F g) hY h)
            • (# F g ◃ hh))
           • lassociator (# F g) (# F h) hZ)
          • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z g h ▹ hZ))))
   • lassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) hZ)
  • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Z f (g · h) ▹ hZ)),,
 is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
   (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
      (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
         (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
            (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
               (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator hW f
                  (g · h))

                  hf))
            (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator (# F f)
               hX (g · h)))

            (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

                  (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator

               (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hZ
                  ((pr222 F) X Y Z g h)))))
      (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (# F f)
         (# F (g · h)) hZ))
   (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hZ
      ((pr222 F) W X Z f (g · h))))

               (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                  (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator hW
                     f (g · h))
                  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                     (g · h) hf))
               (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                  (# F f) hX (g · h)))
            (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F f)
               (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                              (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                                 hX g h)
                              (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                                 h hg))
                           (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                              (# F g) hY h))
                        (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
                           (# F g) hh))
                     (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                        (# F g) (# F h) hZ))
                  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hZ
                     ((pr222 F) X Y Z g h)))))
         (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (# F f)
            (# F (g · h)) hZ))
      (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hZ
         ((pr222 F) W X Z f (g · h))))
   • (## F (lassociator f g h) ▹ hZ))

F: psfunctor C C
W, X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ W, X ⟧
g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
h: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧

hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z

hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hY -->[ h] hZ
(((((lassociator hW (f · g) h
     • ((((((lassociator hW f g • (hf ▹ g))
            • rassociator (# F f) hX g) • (# F f ◃ hg))
          • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) hY)
         • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ hY)) ▹ h))
    • rassociator (# F (f · g)) hY h)
   • (# F (f · g) ◃ hh))
  • lassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) hZ)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W Y Z (f · g) h ▹ hZ)),,
is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator hW
                 (f · g) h)
              (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker h
                 (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

                          (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                             (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                                (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                                   hW f g)
                                (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker

                             (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                                (# F f) hX g))
                          (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
                             (# F f) hg))
                       (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                          (# F f) (# F g) hY))
                    (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hY
                       ((pr222 F) W X Y f g)))))
           (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
              (# F (f · g)) hY h))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F (f · g)) hh))
     (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator (# F (f · g))
        (# F h) hZ))
  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hZ
     ((pr222 F) W Y Z (f · g) h)) =
((is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker hW
    (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)) ^-1
 • ((((((lassociator hW f (g · h) • (hf ▹ g · h))
        • rassociator (# F f) hX (g · h))
       • (# F f
          ◃ (((((lassociator hX g h • (hg ▹ h))
                • rassociator (# F g) hY h)
               • (# F g ◃ hh))
              • lassociator (# F g) (# F h) hZ)
             • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z g h ▹ hZ))))
      • lassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) hZ)
     • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Z f (g · h) ▹ hZ)),,
    is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
      (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
         (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
            (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
               (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                  (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator hW
                     f (g · h))
                  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker

               (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                  (# F f) hX (g · h)))
            (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker (# F f)
               (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

                        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

                                 hX g h)
                              (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker

                        (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker

                        (# F g) (# F h) hZ))
                  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker hZ

            (# F (g · h)) hZ))

      • ((((((lassociator hW f g • (...))

   (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)) ^-1
• ((((((lassociator hW f (g · h) • (hf ▹ g · h))
       • rassociator (# F f) hX (g · h))
      • (# F f
         ◃ (((((lassociator hX g h • (hg ▹ h))

F: psfunctor C C
W, X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ W, X ⟧
g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
h: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧

hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hW -->[ f] hX
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hY -->[ h] hZ
(((((lassociator hW (f · g) h
     • ((((((lassociator hW f g • (hf ▹ g))
            • rassociator (# F f) hX g) • (# F f ◃ hg))
          • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) hY)
         • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ hY)) ▹ h))
    • rassociator (# F (f · g)) hY h)
   • (# F (f · g) ◃ hh))
  • lassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) hZ)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W Y Z (f · g) h ▹ hZ))
• (## F (rassociator f g h) ▹ hZ) =
(hW ◃ rassociator f g h)
• (((((lassociator hW f (g · h) • (hf ▹ g · h))
      • rassociator (# F f) hX (g · h))
     • (# F f
        ◃ (((((lassociator hX g h • (hg ▹ h))
              • rassociator (# F g) hY h)

            • lassociator (# F g) (# F h) hZ)

    • lassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) hZ)
   • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Z f (g · h) ▹ hZ))

h: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧

hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hW -->[ f] hX
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hY -->[ h] hZ
(hW ◃ rassociator f g h)
• (((((lassociator hW f (g · h) • (hf ▹ g · h))
      • rassociator (# F f) hX (g · h))
     • (# F f
        ◃ (((((lassociator hX g h • (hg ▹ h))
              • rassociator (# F g) hY h)
             • (# F g ◃ hh))
            • lassociator (# F g) (# F h) hZ)
           • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z g h ▹ hZ))))
    • lassociator (# F f) (# F (g · h)) hZ)
   • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Z f (g · h) ▹ hZ)) =
(((((lassociator hW (f · g) h
     • ((((((lassociator hW f g • (hf ▹ g))
            • rassociator (# F f) hX g) • (# F f ◃ hg))
          • lassociator (# F f) (# F g) hY)
         • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W X Y f g ▹ hY)) ▹ h))
    • rassociator (# F (f · g)) hY h)
   • (# F (f · g) ◃ hh))
  • lassociator (# F (f · g)) (# F h) hZ)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) W Y Z (f · g) h ▹ hZ))
• (## F (rassociator f g h) ▹ hZ)

      exact (disp_alg_lassociator hf hg hh).
    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b : C) (f g h : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (r : f ==> g)
(s : g ==> h) (x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg : x -->[ g] y) (hh : x -->[ h] y),
ff ==>[ r] gg → gg ==>[ s] hh → ff ==>[ r • s] hh
 
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hX -->[ h] hY
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg
hβ: hg ==>[ β] hh
(hX ◃ (α • β)) • hh = hf • (## F (α • β) ▹ hY)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hX -->[ h] hY
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg
hβ: hg ==>[ β] hh
((hX ◃ α) • (hX ◃ β)) • hh = hf • (## F (α • β) ▹ hY)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hX -->[ h] hY
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg
hβ: hg ==>[ β] hh
(hX ◃ α) • ((hX ◃ β) • hh) = hf • (## F (α • β) ▹ hY)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hX -->[ h] hY
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg
hβ: hg ==>[ β] hh
(hX ◃ α) • (hg • (## F β ▹ hY)) =
hf • (## F (α • β) ▹ hY)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hX -->[ h] hY
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg
hβ: hg ==>[ β] hh
((hX ◃ α) • hg) • (## F β ▹ hY) =
hf • (## F (α • β) ▹ hY)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hX -->[ h] hY
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg
hβ: hg ==>[ β] hh
(hf • (## F α ▹ hY)) • (## F β ▹ hY) =
hf • (## F (α • β) ▹ hY)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hX -->[ h] hY
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg
hβ: hg ==>[ β] hh
hf • ((## F α ▹ hY) • (## F β ▹ hY)) =
hf • (## F (α • β) ▹ hY)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hX -->[ h] hY
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg
hβ: hg ==>[ β] hh
hf • ((## F α • ## F β) ▹ hY) =
hf • (## F (α • β) ▹ hY)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
β: g ==> h
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hh: hX -->[ h] hY
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg
hβ: hg ==>[ β] hh
hf • (## F (α • β) ▹ hY) = hf • (## F (α • β) ▹ hY)

      reflexivity.
    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g1 g2 : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : g1 ==> g2) (x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b)
(z : disp_alg_prebicat_1 c) (ff : x -->[ f] y)
(gg1 : y -->[ g1] z) (gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
gg1 ==>[ r] gg2 → ff ;; gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] ff ;; gg2
 
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hY -->[ g₁] hZ
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hg₁ ==>[ α] hg₂
(hX ◃ (f ◃ α))
• (((((lassociator hX f g₂ • (hf ▹ g₂))
      • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂) • (# F f ◃ hg₂))
    • lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ)
   • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₂ ▹ hZ)) =
(((((lassociator hX f g₁ • (hf ▹ g₁))
    • rassociator (# F f) hY g₁) • (# F f ◃ hg₁))
  • lassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) hZ)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₁ ▹ hZ))
• (## F (f ◃ α) ▹ hZ)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hY -->[ g₁] hZ
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hg₁ ==>[ α] hg₂
((((((hX ◃ (f ◃ α)) • lassociator hX f g₂) • (hf ▹ g₂))
   • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂) • (# F f ◃ hg₂))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ)
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₂ ▹ hZ) =
(((((lassociator hX f g₁ • (hf ▹ g₁))
    • rassociator (# F f) hY g₁) • (# F f ◃ hg₁))
  • lassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) hZ)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₁ ▹ hZ))
• (## F (f ◃ α) ▹ hZ)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hY -->[ g₁] hZ
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hg₁ ==>[ α] hg₂
(((((lassociator hX f g₁ • (hX · f ◃ α)) • (hf ▹ g₂))
   • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂) • (# F f ◃ hg₂))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ)
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₂ ▹ hZ) =
(((((lassociator hX f g₁ • (hf ▹ g₁))
    • rassociator (# F f) hY g₁) • (# F f ◃ hg₁))
  • lassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) hZ)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₁ ▹ hZ))
• (## F (f ◃ α) ▹ hZ)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hY -->[ g₁] hZ
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hg₁ ==>[ α] hg₂
lassociator hX f g₁
• ((hX · f ◃ α)
   • ((hf ▹ g₂)
      • (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂
         • ((# F f ◃ hg₂)
            • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ
               • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₂ ▹ hZ)))))) =
lassociator hX f g₁
• ((hf ▹ g₁)
   • (rassociator (# F f) hY g₁
      • ((# F f ◃ hg₁)
         • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) hZ
            • (((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₁ ▹ hZ)
               • (## F (f ◃ α) ▹ hZ))))))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hY -->[ g₁] hZ
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hg₁ ==>[ α] hg₂
(hX · f ◃ α)
• ((hf ▹ g₂)
   • (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂
      • ((# F f ◃ hg₂)
         • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ
            • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₂ ▹ hZ))))) =
(hf ▹ g₁)
• (rassociator (# F f) hY g₁
   • ((# F f ◃ hg₁)
      • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) hZ
         • (((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₁ ▹ hZ)
            • (## F (f ◃ α) ▹ hZ)))))

F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧

hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hY -->[ g₁] hZ
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hg₁ ==>[ α] hg₂
(hX · f ◃ α)
• ((hf ▹ g₂)
   • (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂
      • ((# F f ◃ hg₂)
         • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ
            • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₂ ▹ hZ))))) =
(hf ▹ g₁)
• (rassociator (# F f) hY g₁
   • ((# F f ◃ hg₁)
      • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) hZ
         • (((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₁ • ## F (f ◃ α))
            ▹ hZ))))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hY -->[ g₁] hZ
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hg₁ ==>[ α] hg₂
(hX · f ◃ α)
• ((hf ▹ g₂)
   • (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂
      • ((# F f ◃ hg₂)
         • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ
            • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₂ ▹ hZ))))) =
(hf ▹ g₁)
• (rassociator (# F f) hY g₁
   • ((# F f ◃ hg₁)
      • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) hZ
         • (((# F f ◃ ## F α) • psfunctor_comp F f g₂)
            ▹ hZ))))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧

hf: hX -->[ f] hY

hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hg₁ ==>[ α] hg₂
(hX · f ◃ α)
• ((hf ▹ g₂)
   • (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂

         • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ
            • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₂ ▹ hZ))))) =

• (rassociator (# F f) hY g₁

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hY -->[ g₁] hZ
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hg₁ ==>[ α] hg₂
(((((hX · f ◃ α) • (hf ▹ g₂))
   • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂) • (# F f ◃ hg₂))
 • lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ)
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₂ ▹ hZ) =
(((((hf ▹ g₁) • rassociator (# F f) hY g₁)
   • (# F f ◃ hg₁)) • lassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) hZ)
 • ((# F f ◃ ## F α) ▹ hZ))
• (psfunctor_comp F f g₂ ▹ hZ)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂

hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hY -->[ g₁] hZ
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hg₁ ==>[ α] hg₂
((((hX · f ◃ α) • (hf ▹ g₂))
  • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂) • (# F f ◃ hg₂))
• lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ =
((((hf ▹ g₁) • rassociator (# F f) hY g₁)
  • (# F f ◃ hg₁)) • lassociator (# F f) (# F g₁) hZ)
• ((# F f ◃ ## F α) ▹ hZ)

hg₁: hY -->[ g₁] hZ
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hg₁ ==>[ α] hg₂
(hX · f ◃ α)
• ((hf ▹ g₂)
   • (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂
      • ((# F f ◃ hg₂)
         • lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ))) =

  • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂) • (# F f ◃ hg₂))
• lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ =

 • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂) • (# F f ◃ hg₂) =
(((hf ▹ g₁) • rassociator (# F f) hY g₁)
 • (# F f ◃ hg₁)) • (# F f ◃ (## F α ▹ hZ))

F: psfunctor C C

f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧

hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hY -->[ g₁] hZ
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hg₁ ==>[ α] hg₂
(hX · f ◃ α)
• ((hf ▹ g₂)
   • (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂ • (# F f ◃ hg₂))) =
(hf ▹ g₁)
• (rassociator (# F f) hY g₁
   • ((# F f ◃ hg₁) • (# F f ◃ (## F α ▹ hZ))))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C

hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hg₁ ==>[ α] hg₂
(hX · f ◃ α)
• ((hf ▹ g₂)
   • (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂ • (# F f ◃ hg₂))) =
(hf ▹ g₁)
• (rassociator (# F f) hY g₁
   • (# F f ◃ (hg₁ • (## F α ▹ hZ))))

F: psfunctor C C

hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hg₁ ==>[ α] hg₂
(hX · f ◃ α)
• ((hf ▹ g₂)
   • (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂ • (# F f ◃ hg₂))) =
(hf ▹ g₁)
• (rassociator (# F f) hY g₁
   • (# F f ◃ ((hY ◃ α) • hg₂)))

(hf ▹ g₁)
• (rassociator (# F f) hY g₁
   • ((# F f ◃ (hY ◃ α)) • (# F f ◃ hg₂)))

F: psfunctor C C

hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ

(hX · f ◃ α)

   • (# F f ◃ hg₂)) =
(hf ▹ g₁)
• ((rassociator (# F f) hY g₁ • (# F f ◃ (hY ◃ α)))
   • (# F f ◃ hg₂))

(hf ▹ g₁)
• (((# F f · hY ◃ α) • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂)
