C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hY -->[ g₁] hZ
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hg₁ ==>[ α] hg₂
(((hX · f ◃ α) • (hf ▹ g₂))
 • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂) • (# F f ◃ hg₂) =
(((hf ▹ g₁) • (# F f · hY ◃ α))
 • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂) • (# F f ◃ hg₂)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hY -->[ g₁] hZ
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hg₁ ==>[ α] hg₂
(hX · f ◃ α) • (hf ▹ g₂) =
(hf ▹ g₁) • (# F f · hY ◃ α)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: g₁ ==> g₂
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hY -->[ g₁] hZ
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hg₁ ==>[ α] hg₂
(hX · f ◃ α) • (hf ▹ g₂) = (hX · f ◃ α) • (hf ▹ g₂)

      reflexivity.
    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
∏ (a b c : C) (f1 f2 : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(r : f1 ==> f2) (x : disp_alg_prebicat_1 a)
(y : disp_alg_prebicat_1 b)
(z : disp_alg_prebicat_1 c) (ff1 : x -->[ f1] y)
(ff2 : x -->[ f2] y) (gg : y -->[ g] z),
ff1 ==>[ r] ff2 → ff1 ;; gg ==>[ r ▹ g] ff2 ;; gg
 
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f, g₁: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: f ==> g₁
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hX -->[ g₁] hY
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg₁
(hX ◃ (α ▹ g₂))
• (((((lassociator hX g₁ g₂ • (hg₁ ▹ g₂))
      • rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂) • (# F g₁ ◃ hg₂))
    • lassociator (# F g₁) (# F g₂) hZ)
   • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z g₁ g₂ ▹ hZ)) =
(((((lassociator hX f g₂ • (hf ▹ g₂))
    • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂) • (# F f ◃ hg₂))
  • lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₂ ▹ hZ))
• (## F (α ▹ g₂) ▹ hZ)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f, g₁: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: f ==> g₁
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hX -->[ g₁] hY
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg₁
((((((hX ◃ (α ▹ g₂)) • lassociator hX g₁ g₂)
    • (hg₁ ▹ g₂)) • rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂)
  • (# F g₁ ◃ hg₂)) • lassociator (# F g₁) (# F g₂) hZ)
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z g₁ g₂ ▹ hZ) =
(((((lassociator hX f g₂ • (hf ▹ g₂))
    • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂) • (# F f ◃ hg₂))
  • lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₂ ▹ hZ))
• (## F (α ▹ g₂) ▹ hZ)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f, g₁: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: f ==> g₁
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hX -->[ g₁] hY
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg₁
(((((lassociator hX f g₂ • ((hX ◃ α) ▹ g₂))
    • (hg₁ ▹ g₂)) • rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂)
  • (# F g₁ ◃ hg₂)) • lassociator (# F g₁) (# F g₂) hZ)
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z g₁ g₂ ▹ hZ) =
(((((lassociator hX f g₂ • (hf ▹ g₂))
    • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂) • (# F f ◃ hg₂))
  • lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₂ ▹ hZ))
• (## F (α ▹ g₂) ▹ hZ)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f, g₁: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: f ==> g₁
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hX -->[ g₁] hY
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg₁
lassociator hX f g₂
• (((hX ◃ α) ▹ g₂)
   • ((hg₁ ▹ g₂)
      • (rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂
         • ((# F g₁ ◃ hg₂)
            • (lassociator (# F g₁) (# F g₂) hZ
               • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z g₁ g₂ ▹ hZ)))))) =
lassociator hX f g₂
• ((hf ▹ g₂)
   • (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂
      • ((# F f ◃ hg₂)
         • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ
            • (((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₂ ▹ hZ)
               • (## F (α ▹ g₂) ▹ hZ))))))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f, g₁: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: f ==> g₁
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hX -->[ g₁] hY
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg₁
((hX ◃ α) ▹ g₂)
• ((hg₁ ▹ g₂)
   • (rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂
      • ((# F g₁ ◃ hg₂)
         • (lassociator (# F g₁) (# F g₂) hZ
            • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z g₁ g₂ ▹ hZ))))) =
(hf ▹ g₂)
• (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂
   • ((# F f ◃ hg₂)
      • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ
         • (((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₂ ▹ hZ)
            • (## F (α ▹ g₂) ▹ hZ)))))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f, g₁: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧

hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z

hg₁: hX -->[ g₁] hY
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg₁
((hX ◃ α) ▹ g₂)
• ((hg₁ ▹ g₂)
   • (rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂
      • ((# F g₁ ◃ hg₂)
         • (lassociator (# F g₁) (# F g₂) hZ
            • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z g₁ g₂ ▹ hZ))))) =
(hf ▹ g₂)
• (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂
   • ((# F f ◃ hg₂)
      • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ
         • (((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z f g₂
             • ## F (α ▹ g₂)) ▹ hZ))))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f, g₁: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: f ==> g₁
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hX -->[ g₁] hY
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg₁
((hX ◃ α) ▹ g₂)
• ((hg₁ ▹ g₂)
   • (rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂
      • ((# F g₁ ◃ hg₂)
         • (lassociator (# F g₁) (# F g₂) hZ
            • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z g₁ g₂ ▹ hZ))))) =
(hf ▹ g₂)
• (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂
   • ((# F f ◃ hg₂)
      • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ
         • (((## F α ▹ # F g₂)
             • psfunctor_comp F g₁ g₂) ▹ hZ))))

F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f, g₁: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧

hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z

hg₁: hX -->[ g₁] hY
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg₁
((hX ◃ α) ▹ g₂)
• ((hg₁ ▹ g₂)
   • (rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂
      • ((# F g₁ ◃ hg₂)
         • (lassociator (# F g₁) (# F g₂) hZ
            • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z g₁ g₂ ▹ hZ))))) =
(hf ▹ g₂)
• (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂
   • ((# F f ◃ hg₂)
      • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ

            • (psfunctor_comp F g₁ g₂ ▹ hZ)))))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f, g₁: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: f ==> g₁
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hX -->[ g₁] hY
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg₁
((((((hX ◃ α) ▹ g₂) • (hg₁ ▹ g₂))
   • rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂) • (# F g₁ ◃ hg₂))
 • lassociator (# F g₁) (# F g₂) hZ)
• ((pr222 (pr1 F)) X Y Z g₁ g₂ ▹ hZ) =
(((((hf ▹ g₂) • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂)
   • (# F f ◃ hg₂)) • lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ)
 • ((## F α ▹ # F g₂) ▹ hZ))
• (psfunctor_comp F g₁ g₂ ▹ hZ)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C

hg₁: hX -->[ g₁] hY
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg₁
(((((hX ◃ α) ▹ g₂) • (hg₁ ▹ g₂))
  • rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂) • (# F g₁ ◃ hg₂))
• lassociator (# F g₁) (# F g₂) hZ =
((((hf ▹ g₂) • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂)
  • (# F f ◃ hg₂)) • lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ)
• ((## F α ▹ # F g₂) ▹ hZ)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f, g₁: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: f ==> g₁

hg₁: hX -->[ g₁] hY
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg₁
((hX ◃ α) ▹ g₂)
• ((hg₁ ▹ g₂)
   • (rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂
      • ((# F g₁ ◃ hg₂)
         • lassociator (# F g₁) (# F g₂) hZ))) =

• (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂
   • ((# F f ◃ hg₂)
      • (lassociator (# F f) (# F g₂) hZ

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f, g₁: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: f ==> g₁

hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z

hg₁: hX -->[ g₁] hY
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg₁
((hX ◃ α) ▹ g₂)
• ((hg₁ ▹ g₂)
   • (rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂
      • ((# F g₁ ◃ hg₂)
         • lassociator (# F g₁) (# F g₂) hZ))) =
(hf ▹ g₂)
• (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂
   • ((# F f ◃ hg₂)
      • ((## F α ▹ # F g₂ · hZ)
         • lassociator (# F g₁) (# F g₂) hZ)))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C

hg₁: hX -->[ g₁] hY
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg₁
(((((hX ◃ α) ▹ g₂) • (hg₁ ▹ g₂))
  • rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂) • (# F g₁ ◃ hg₂))
• lassociator (# F g₁) (# F g₂) hZ =
((((hf ▹ g₂) • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂)
  • (# F f ◃ hg₂)) • (## F α ▹ # F g₂ · hZ))
• lassociator (# F g₁) (# F g₂) hZ

(((hX ◃ α) ▹ g₂) • (hg₁ ▹ g₂))
• rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂ =

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f, g₁: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧

hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg₁
(((hX ◃ α) • hg₁) ▹ g₂) • rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂ =
((hf ▹ g₂) • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂)
• (## F α ▹ hY · g₂)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f, g₁: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: f ==> g₁
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X

hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hX -->[ g₁] hY
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg₁
((hf • (## F α ▹ hY)) ▹ g₂)
• rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂ =
((hf ▹ g₂) • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂)
• (## F α ▹ hY · g₂)

• rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂ =
((hf ▹ g₂) • rassociator (# F f) hY g₂)
• (## F α ▹ hY · g₂)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f, g₁: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: f ==> g₁
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hX -->[ g₁] hY
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg₁
(hf ▹ g₂)
• (((## F α ▹ hY) ▹ g₂) • rassociator (# F g₁) hY g₂) =
(hf ▹ g₂)
• (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂ • (## F α ▹ hY · g₂))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y, Z: C
f, g₁: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₂: C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
α: f ==> g₁
hX: disp_alg_prebicat_1 X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Y
hZ: disp_alg_prebicat_1 Z
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg₁: hX -->[ g₁] hY
hg₂: hY -->[ g₂] hZ
hα: hf ==>[ α] hg₁
(hf ▹ g₂)
• (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂ • (## F α ▹ hY · g₂)) =
(hf ▹ g₂)
• (rassociator (# F f) hY g₂ • (## F α ▹ hY · g₂))

      reflexivity.
  Qed.

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
disp_prebicat_laws
  (disp_alg_prebicat_1,, disp_alg_ops)

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
disp_prebicat_laws
  (disp_alg_prebicat_1,, disp_alg_ops)

    repeat split ; intro ; intros ; apply C.
  Qed.

  Definition disp_alg_prebicat : disp_prebicat C
    := (_ ,, disp_alg_ops_laws).

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
disp_bicat C

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
disp_bicat C

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
has_disp_cellset disp_alg_prebicat

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f, g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
hX: disp_alg_prebicat X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hα, hβ: hf ==>[ α] hg
isaprop (hα = hβ)

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
X, Y: C
f, g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
hX: disp_alg_prebicat X
hY: disp_alg_prebicat Y
hf: hX -->[ f] hY
hg: hX -->[ g] hY
hα, hβ: hf ==>[ α] hg
isaprop (hf ==>[ α] hg)

    
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g
     → Map1Cells.Fmor x f ==> Map1Cells.Fmor x g)
    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>
       Map1Cells.Fmor x (id₁ X))
      × (∏ (X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
         Map1Cells.Fmor x f · Map1Cells.Fmor x g ==>
         Map1Cells.Fmor x (f · g)), is_psfunctor x
X, Y: C
f, g: C ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: f ==> g
hX: C ⟦ F X, X ⟧
hY: C ⟦ F Y, Y ⟧
hf: invertible_2cell (hX · f) (# F f · hY)
hg: invertible_2cell (hX · g) (# F g · hY)
hα, hβ: (hX ◃ α) • hg = hf • (## F α ▹ hY)
∏ x x' : (hX ◃ α) • hg = hf • (## F α ▹ hY),
iscontr (x = x')

    exact (pr2 C _ _ _ _ ((hX ◃ α) • hg) (hf • (## F α ▹ hY))).
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_alg_bicat a
bb: disp_alg_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_alg_bicat a
bb: disp_alg_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_alg_bicat a
bb: disp_alg_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_alg_bicat a
bb: disp_alg_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
(λ y : gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff,
 xx •• y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
   (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)
 × y •• xx =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
     (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg)) ?pr1

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C

f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_alg_bicat a
bb: disp_alg_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff
 
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g
     → Map1Cells.Fmor x f ==> Map1Cells.Fmor x g)
    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>
       Map1Cells.Fmor x (id₁ X))
      × (∏ (X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
         Map1Cells.Fmor x f · Map1Cells.Fmor x g ==>
         Map1Cells.Fmor x (f · g)), is_psfunctor x
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: C ⟦ F a, a ⟧
bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧
ff: invertible_2cell (aa · f) (# F f · bb)
gg: invertible_2cell (aa · g) (# F g · bb)
xx: alg_disp_cat_2cell a b f g x aa bb ff gg
alg_disp_cat_2cell a b g f x ^-1 aa bb gg ff

      
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g
     → Map1Cells.Fmor x f ==> Map1Cells.Fmor x g)
    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>
       Map1Cells.Fmor x (id₁ X))
      × (∏ (X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
         Map1Cells.Fmor x f · Map1Cells.Fmor x g ==>
         Map1Cells.Fmor x (f · g)), is_psfunctor x
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: C ⟦ F a, a ⟧
bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧
ff: invertible_2cell (aa · f) (# F f · bb)
gg: invertible_2cell (aa · g) (# F g · bb)
xx: (aa ◃ x) • gg = ff • (## F x ▹ bb)
(aa ◃ x ^-1) • ff = gg • (## F x ^-1 ▹ bb)

F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),

    × (∏ X : C,

aa: C ⟦ F a, a ⟧
bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧

gg: invertible_2cell (aa · g) (# F g · bb)
xx: (aa ◃ x) • gg = ff • (## F x ▹ bb)

C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g
     → Map1Cells.Fmor x f ==> Map1Cells.Fmor x g)
    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>
       Map1Cells.Fmor x (id₁ X))
      × (∏ (X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
         Map1Cells.Fmor x f · Map1Cells.Fmor x g ==>

f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: C ⟦ F a, a ⟧
bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧
ff: invertible_2cell (aa · f) (# F f · bb)
gg: invertible_2cell (aa · g) (# F g · bb)
xx: (aa ◃ x) • gg = ff • (## F x ▹ bb)
ff = ?Hε ^-1 • (gg • (## F x ^-1 ▹ bb))

      
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g

    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>

bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧

gg: invertible_2cell (aa · g) (# F g · bb)
xx: (aa ◃ x) • gg = ff • (## F x ▹ bb)
is_invertible_2cell (aa ◃ x ^-1)
 is_iso. 
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g
     → Map1Cells.Fmor x f ==> Map1Cells.Fmor x g)
    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>
       Map1Cells.Fmor x (id₁ X))
      × (∏ (X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
         Map1Cells.Fmor x f · Map1Cells.Fmor x g ==>
         Map1Cells.Fmor x (f · g)), is_psfunctor x
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: C ⟦ F a, a ⟧
bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧
ff: invertible_2cell (aa · f) (# F f · bb)
gg: invertible_2cell (aa · g) (# F g · bb)
xx: (aa ◃ x) • gg = ff • (## F x ▹ bb)
ff =
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker aa
   (is_invertible_2cell_inv x)) ^-1
• (gg • (## F x ^-1 ▹ bb))

      
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g
     → Map1Cells.Fmor x f ==> Map1Cells.Fmor x g)
    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>
       Map1Cells.Fmor x (id₁ X))

bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧

gg: invertible_2cell (aa · g) (# F g · bb)
xx: (aa ◃ x) • gg = ff • (## F x ▹ bb)
ff = (aa ◃ x) • (gg • (## F x ^-1 ▹ bb))

F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,

ff = ((aa ◃ x) • gg) • (## F x ^-1 ▹ bb)

bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧
ff: invertible_2cell (aa · f) (# F f · bb)
gg: invertible_2cell (aa · g) (# F g · bb)
xx: (aa ◃ x) • gg = ff • (## F x ▹ bb)
is_invertible_2cell x ^-1

        is_iso.
      
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g
     → Map1Cells.Fmor x f ==> Map1Cells.Fmor x g)
    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>
       Map1Cells.Fmor x (id₁ X))
      × (∏ (X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
         Map1Cells.Fmor x f · Map1Cells.Fmor x g ==>
         Map1Cells.Fmor x (f · g)), is_psfunctor x
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: C ⟦ F a, a ⟧
bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧
ff: invertible_2cell (aa · f) (# F f · bb)
gg: invertible_2cell (aa · g) (# F g · bb)
xx: (aa ◃ x) • gg = ff • (## F x ▹ bb)
ff
• (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker bb
     (psfunctor_is_iso F
        (x ^-1,, is_invertible_2cell_inv x))) ^-1 =
(aa ◃ x) • gg

      
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g
     → Map1Cells.Fmor x f ==> Map1Cells.Fmor x g)
    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>
       Map1Cells.Fmor x (id₁ X))
      × (∏ (X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
         Map1Cells.Fmor x f · Map1Cells.Fmor x g ==>
         Map1Cells.Fmor x (f · g)), is_psfunctor x
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: C ⟦ F a, a ⟧
bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧
ff: invertible_2cell (aa · f) (# F f · bb)
gg: invertible_2cell (aa · g) (# F g · bb)
xx: (aa ◃ x) • gg = ff • (## F x ▹ bb)
ff • (## F x ▹ bb) = (aa ◃ x) • gg

      exact (!xx).
    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_alg_bicat a
bb: disp_alg_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
(λ y : gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff,
 xx •• y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
   (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)
 × y •• xx =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
     (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg))
  ((vcomp_move_R_pM ff (gg • (## F x ^-1 ▹ bb))
      (aa ◃ x ^-1)
      (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker aa
         (is_invertible_2cell_inv x))
      (internal_paths_rew_r (aa · f ==> # F f · bb)
         ((aa ◃ x) • (gg • (## F x ^-1 ▹ bb)))
         (((aa ◃ x) • gg) • (## F x ^-1 ▹ bb))
         (λ p : aa · f ==> # F f · bb, ff = p)
         (vcomp_move_L_Mp ff ((aa ◃ x) • gg)
            (## F x ^-1 ▹ bb)
            (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker bb
               (psfunctor_is_iso F
                  (x ^-1,, is_invertible_2cell_inv x)))
            (! xx
             :
             ff
             • (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker bb
                  (psfunctor_is_iso F
                     (x ^-1,,
                      is_invertible_2cell_inv x))) ^-1 =
             (aa ◃ x) • gg))
         (vassocr (aa ◃ x) gg (## F x ^-1 ▹ bb))
       :
       ff =
       (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker aa
          (is_invertible_2cell_inv x)) ^-1
       • (gg • (## F x ^-1 ▹ bb)))
    :
    alg_disp_cat_2cell a b g f x ^-1 aa bb gg ff)
   :
   gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff)
 split ; apply C.
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_alg_bicat a
bb: disp_alg_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isaprop (disp_invertible_2cell x ff gg)

gg: aa -->[ g] bb

      apply isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell.

 apply C.
  Defined.

p: f = g

  gg

    (idpath f) ff = gg

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: disp_alg_bicat a
bb: disp_alg_bicat b
ff, gg: aa -->[ f] bb
x: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff
  gg
d:= pr1 x: ff ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] gg
ff = gg

      
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g
     → Map1Cells.Fmor x f ==> Map1Cells.Fmor x g)
    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>
       Map1Cells.Fmor x (id₁ X))
      × (∏ (X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
         Map1Cells.Fmor x f · Map1Cells.Fmor x g ==>
         Map1Cells.Fmor x (f · g)), is_psfunctor x
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: C ⟦ F a, a ⟧
bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧
ff, gg: invertible_2cell (aa · f) (# F f · bb)
x: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff
  gg
d:= pr1 x: alg_disp_cat_2cell a b f f (id₂ f) aa bb ff gg
ff = gg

      
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g
     → Map1Cells.Fmor x f ==> Map1Cells.Fmor x g)
    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>
       Map1Cells.Fmor x (id₁ X))
      × (∏ (X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
         Map1Cells.Fmor x f · Map1Cells.Fmor x g ==>
         Map1Cells.Fmor x (f · g)), is_psfunctor x
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: C ⟦ F a, a ⟧
bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧
ff, gg: invertible_2cell (aa · f) (# F f · bb)
x: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff
  gg
d:= pr1 x: (aa ◃ id₂ f) • gg = ff • (## F (id₂ f) ▹ bb)
ff = gg

      
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g
     → Map1Cells.Fmor x f ==> Map1Cells.Fmor x g)
    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>
       Map1Cells.Fmor x (id₁ X))
      × (∏ (X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
         Map1Cells.Fmor x f · Map1Cells.Fmor x g ==>
         Map1Cells.Fmor x (f · g)), is_psfunctor x
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: C ⟦ F a, a ⟧
bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧
ff, gg: invertible_2cell (aa · f) (# F f · bb)
x: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff
  gg
d: id₂ (aa · f) • gg = ff • (## F (id₂ f) ▹ bb)
ff = gg

      
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g
     → Map1Cells.Fmor x f ==> Map1Cells.Fmor x g)
    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>
       Map1Cells.Fmor x (id₁ X))
      × (∏ (X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
         Map1Cells.Fmor x f · Map1Cells.Fmor x g ==>
         Map1Cells.Fmor x (f · g)), is_psfunctor x
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: C ⟦ F a, a ⟧
bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧
ff, gg: invertible_2cell (aa · f) (# F f · bb)
x: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff
  gg
d: gg = ff • (## F (id₂ f) ▹ bb)
ff = gg

      
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g
     → Map1Cells.Fmor x f ==> Map1Cells.Fmor x g)
    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>
       Map1Cells.Fmor x (id₁ X))
      × (∏ (X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
         Map1Cells.Fmor x f · Map1Cells.Fmor x g ==>
         Map1Cells.Fmor x (f · g)), is_psfunctor x
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: C ⟦ F a, a ⟧
bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧
ff, gg: invertible_2cell (aa · f) (# F f · bb)
x: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff
  gg
d: gg = ff • (id₂ (# F f) ▹ bb)
ff = gg

      
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g
     → Map1Cells.Fmor x f ==> Map1Cells.Fmor x g)
    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>
       Map1Cells.Fmor x (id₁ X))
      × (∏ (X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
         Map1Cells.Fmor x f · Map1Cells.Fmor x g ==>
         Map1Cells.Fmor x (f · g)), is_psfunctor x
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: C ⟦ F a, a ⟧
bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧
ff, gg: invertible_2cell (aa · f) (# F f · bb)
x: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff
  gg
d: gg = ff • id₂ (# F f · bb)
ff = gg

      
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),

         (g : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
         Map1Cells.Fmor x f · Map1Cells.Fmor x g ==>

f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: C ⟦ F a, a ⟧
bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧

x: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff

C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),

f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧
ff, gg: invertible_2cell (aa · f) (# F f · bb)

C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),

f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: C ⟦ F a, a ⟧
bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧
ff, gg: invertible_2cell (aa · f) (# F f · bb)
x: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff
  gg
d: gg = ff
pr1 ff = pr1 gg

      
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g
     → Map1Cells.Fmor x f ==> Map1Cells.Fmor x g)
    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>

      × (∏ (X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
         Map1Cells.Fmor x f · Map1Cells.Fmor x g ==>

f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: C ⟦ F a, a ⟧
bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧
ff, gg: invertible_2cell (aa · f) (# F f · bb)
x: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff
  gg
d: gg = ff
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
 intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell. 
C: bicat
F: ∑
x : ∑
    x : ∑ x : C → C,
        ∏ X Y : C, C ⟦ X, Y ⟧ → C ⟦ x X, x Y ⟧,
    (∏ (X Y : C) (f g : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧),
     f ==> g
     → Map1Cells.Fmor x f ==> Map1Cells.Fmor x g)
    × (∏ X : C,
       id₁ (Map1Cells.Fobj x X) ==>
       Map1Cells.Fmor x (id₁ X))
      × (∏ (X Y Z : C) (f : C ⟦ X, Y ⟧)
         (g : C ⟦ Y, Z ⟧),
         Map1Cells.Fmor x f · Map1Cells.Fmor x g ==>
         Map1Cells.Fmor x (f · g)), is_psfunctor x
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: C ⟦ F a, a ⟧
bb: C ⟦ F b, b ⟧
ff, gg: invertible_2cell (aa · f) (# F f · bb)
x: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff
  gg
d: gg = ff
pr1 ff = pr1 gg

      exact (!d).
    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: disp_alg_bicat a
bb: disp_alg_bicat b
ff, gg: aa -->[ f] bb
isaprop
  (transportf (λ z : C ⟦ a, b ⟧, aa -->[ z] bb)
     (idpath f) ff = gg)
 apply isaset_invertible_2cell.
    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: disp_alg_bicat a
bb: disp_alg_bicat b
ff, gg: aa -->[ f] bb
isaprop
  (disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f))
     ff gg)
 apply disp_alg_bicat_disp_invertible_2cell.
  Defined.

  Section Invertible2CellToDispAdjointEquivalence.
    Context {a : C}.
    Variable (aa bb : disp_alg_bicat a)
             (x : invertible_2cell aa bb).

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: invertible_2cell aa bb
aa -->[ internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a] bb

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: invertible_2cell aa bb
aa -->[ internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a] bb

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: invertible_2cell aa bb
is_invertible_2cell
  (((runitor aa • x) • linvunitor bb)
   • (psfunctor_id F a ▹ bb))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: invertible_2cell aa bb
is_invertible_2cell x
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: invertible_2cell aa bb
is_invertible_2cell (psfunctor_id F a)

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: invertible_2cell aa bb
is_invertible_2cell x
 exact x.
      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: invertible_2cell aa bb
is_invertible_2cell (psfunctor_id F a)
 exact (psfunctor_id F a).
    Defined.

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: invertible_2cell aa bb
bb -->[
left_adjoint_right_adjoint
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)] aa

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: invertible_2cell aa bb
bb -->[
left_adjoint_right_adjoint
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)] aa

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: invertible_2cell aa bb
is_invertible_2cell
  (((runitor bb • x ^-1) • linvunitor aa)
   • (psfunctor_id F a ▹ aa))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: invertible_2cell aa bb
is_invertible_2cell (psfunctor_id F a)

      exact (psfunctor_id F a).
    Defined.

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: invertible_2cell aa bb
id_disp aa ==>[
left_adjoint_unit
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)] left_adjoint_2cell ;; right_adjoint_2cell

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: invertible_2cell aa bb
(aa ◃ linvunitor (id₁ a))
• (((((lassociator aa (id₁ a) (id₁ a)
       • ((((runitor aa • x) • linvunitor bb)
           • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) a ▹ bb)) ▹ id₁ a))
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ a)) bb (id₁ a))
     • (# F (id₁ a)
        ◃ (((runitor bb • x ^-1) • linvunitor aa)
           • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) a ▹ aa))))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ a)) (# F (id₁ a)) aa)
   • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) a a a (id₁ a) (id₁ a) ▹ aa)) =
((runitor aa • linvunitor aa)
 • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) a ▹ aa))
• (## F (linvunitor (id₁ a)) ▹ aa)

           • (x

      • rassociator (# F (id₁ a)) bb (id₁ a))
     • (# F (id₁ a)

 • (id₁ (F a) ◃ ((pr122 F) a) ^-1))
• ((pr122 (pr1 F)) a ▹ id₁ (F a))

    Defined.
  End Invertible2CellToDispAdjointEquivalence.

  Section DispAdjointEquivalenceToInvertible2cell.
    Context {a : C}.
    Variable (aa bb : disp_alg_bicat a)
             (x : disp_adjoint_equivalence
                    (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)
                    aa bb).

    Local Definition invertible_2cell_map_alg
      : aa ==> bb
      := (rinvunitor _)
           • (aa ◃ linvunitor (id₁ a))
           • lassociator aa (id₁ a) (id₁ a)
           • (cell_from_invertible_2cell (pr1 x) ▹ id₁ a)
           • rassociator (# F (id₁ a)) bb (id₁ a)
           • (inv_cell (psfunctor_id F a) ▹ (bb · _))
           • lunitor (bb · id₁ a)
           • runitor bb.

    Local Definition invertible_2cell_inv_alg
      : bb ==> aa
      := (rinvunitor bb)
           • linvunitor (bb · id₁ a)
           • (psfunctor_id F a ▹ (bb · id₁ a))
           • (# F (id₁ a) ◃ cell_from_invertible_2cell (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint _ (pr12 x)))
           • lassociator (# F (id₁ a)) (# F (id₁ a)) aa
           • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ a) (id₁ a) ▹ aa)
           • (##F (lunitor (id₁ a)) ▹ aa)
           • (inv_cell (psfunctor_id F a) ▹ aa)
           • lunitor aa.

    Definition invertible_2cell_map_alg'
      : aa ==> bb
      := (linvunitor aa)
           • (psfunctor_id F a ▹ aa)
           • (# F (id₁ a) ◃ rinvunitor aa)
           • (# F (id₁ a) ◃ cell_from_invertible_2cell (pr1 x))
           • lassociator (# F (id₁ a)) (# F (id₁ a)) bb
           • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ a) (id₁ a) ▹ bb)
           • (## F (lunitor (id₁ a)) ▹ bb)
           • ((psfunctor_id F a)^-1 ▹ bb)
           • lunitor bb.

    Local Definition invertible_2cell_inv_alg'
      : bb ==> aa
      := (rinvunitor bb)
           • (bb ◃ linvunitor (id₁ a))
           • lassociator bb (id₁ a) (id₁ a)
           • (cell_from_invertible_2cell (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint _ (pr12 x)) ▹ id₁ a)
           • rassociator _ _ _
           • (# F (id₁ a) ◃ runitor aa)
           • ((psfunctor_id F a)^-1 ▹ aa)
           • lunitor aa.

    Definition invertible_2cell_map_alg''
      : aa ==> bb
      := (rinvunitor aa)
           • cell_from_invertible_2cell (pr1 x)
           • ((psfunctor_id F a)^-1 ▹ bb)
           • lunitor bb.

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a) aa bb
invertible_2cell_map_alg = invertible_2cell_map_alg'

    
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a) aa bb
invertible_2cell_map_alg = invertible_2cell_map_alg'

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a) aa bb
((((((rinvunitor aa • (aa ◃ linvunitor (id₁ a)))
     • lassociator aa (id₁ a) (id₁ a))
    • (pr1 x ▹ id₁ a))
   • rassociator (# F (id₁ a)) bb (id₁ a))
  • ((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ bb · id₁ a))
 • lunitor (bb · id₁ a)) • runitor bb =
(((((((linvunitor aa • (psfunctor_id F a ▹ aa))
      • (# F (id₁ a) ◃ rinvunitor aa))
     • (# F (id₁ a) ◃ pr1 x))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ a)) (# F (id₁ a)) bb)
   • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ a) (id₁ a) ▹ bb))
  • (## F (lunitor (id₁ a)) ▹ bb))
 • ((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ bb)) • lunitor bb

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a) aa bb
rinvunitor aa
• ((aa ◃ linvunitor (id₁ a))
   • (lassociator aa (id₁ a) (id₁ a)
      • ((pr1 x ▹ id₁ a)
         • (rassociator (# F (id₁ a)) bb (id₁ a)
            • (((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ bb · id₁ a)
               • (lunitor (bb · id₁ a) • runitor bb)))))) =
linvunitor aa
• ((psfunctor_id F a ▹ aa)
   • ((# F (id₁ a) ◃ rinvunitor aa)
      • ((# F (id₁ a) ◃ pr1 x)
         • (lassociator (# F (id₁ a)) (# F (id₁ a)) bb
            • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ a) (id₁ a) ▹ bb)
               • ((## F (lunitor (id₁ a)) ▹ bb)
                  • (((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ bb)
                     • lunitor bb)))))))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a) aa bb
rinvunitor aa
• ((aa ◃ linvunitor (id₁ a))
   • (((((lassociator aa (id₁ a) (id₁ a)
          • (pr1 x ▹ id₁ a))
         • rassociator (# F (id₁ a)) bb (id₁ a))
        • ((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ bb · id₁ a))
       • lunitor (bb · id₁ a)) • runitor bb)) =
linvunitor aa
• ((psfunctor_id F a ▹ aa)
   • (((((((# F (id₁ a) ◃ rinvunitor aa)
           • (# F (id₁ a) ◃ pr1 x))
          • lassociator (# F (id₁ a)) (# F (id₁ a)) bb)
         • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ a) (id₁ a) ▹ bb))
        • (## F (lunitor (id₁ a)) ▹ bb))
       • ((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ bb)) • lunitor bb))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a) aa bb
rinvunitor aa
• ((aa ◃ linvunitor (id₁ a))
   • (((((lassociator aa (id₁ a) (id₁ a)
          • (pr1 x ▹ id₁ a))
         • rassociator (# F (id₁ a)) bb (id₁ a))
        • ((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ bb · id₁ a))
       • lunitor (bb · id₁ a)) • runitor bb)) =
linvunitor aa
• ((psfunctor_id F a ▹ aa)
   • ((((((# F (id₁ a) ◃ (rinvunitor aa • pr1 x))
          • lassociator (# F (id₁ a)) (# F (id₁ a)) bb)
         • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ a) (id₁ a) ▹ bb))
        • (## F (lunitor (id₁ a)) ▹ bb))
       • ((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ bb)) • lunitor bb))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a) aa bb
rinvunitor aa
• ((aa ◃ linvunitor (id₁ a))
   • (lassociator aa (id₁ a) (id₁ a)
      • ((pr1 x ▹ id₁ a)
         • (rassociator (# F (id₁ a)) bb (id₁ a)
            • (((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ bb · id₁ a)
               • (lunitor (bb · id₁ a) • runitor bb)))))) =
linvunitor aa
• ((psfunctor_id F a ▹ aa)
   • ((# F (id₁ a) ◃ (rinvunitor aa • pr1 x))
      • (lassociator (# F (id₁ a)) (# F (id₁ a)) bb
         • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ a) (id₁ a) ▹ bb)
            • ((## F (lunitor (id₁ a)) ▹ bb)
               • (((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ bb)
                  • lunitor bb))))))

      
C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a) aa bb
rinvunitor aa
• (((((((aa ◃ linvunitor (id₁ a))
        • lassociator aa (id₁ a) (id₁ a))
       • (pr1 x ▹ id₁ a))
      • rassociator (# F (id₁ a)) bb (id₁ a))
     • ((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ bb · id₁ a))
    • lunitor (bb · id₁ a)) • runitor bb) =
linvunitor aa
• (((((((psfunctor_id F a ▹ aa)
        • (# F (id₁ a) ◃ (rinvunitor aa • pr1 x)))
       • lassociator (# F (id₁ a)) (# F (id₁ a)) bb)
      • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ a) (id₁ a) ▹ bb))
     • (## F (lunitor (id₁ a)) ▹ bb))
    • ((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ bb)) • lunitor bb)

       • ((psfunctor_id F a ▹ # F (id₁ a)) ▹ bb))
      • (((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ # F (id₁ a)) ▹ bb))
     • (lunitor (# F (id₁ a)) ▹ bb))
    • ((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ bb)) • lunitor bb)

(((((((rinvunitor bb • linvunitor (bb · id₁ a))
      • (psfunctor_id F a ▹ bb · id₁ a))
     • (# F (id₁ a)
        ◃ disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
            (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)
            (pr12 x)))
    • lassociator (# F (id₁ a)) (# F (id₁ a)) aa)
   • (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ a) (id₁ a) ▹ aa))
  • (## F (lunitor (id₁ a)) ▹ aa))
 • ((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ aa)) • lunitor aa =
((((((rinvunitor bb • (bb ◃ linvunitor (id₁ a)))
     • lassociator bb (id₁ a) (id₁ a))
    • (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)
         (pr12 x) ▹ id₁ a))
   • rassociator
       (# F
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)))
       aa (id₁ a)) • (# F (id₁ a) ◃ runitor aa))
 • ((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ aa)) • lunitor aa

F: psfunctor C C

rinvunitor bb
• (linvunitor (bb · id₁ a)
   • ((psfunctor_id F a ▹ bb · id₁ a)
      • ((# F (id₁ a)
          ◃ disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
              (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)
              (pr12 x))
         • (lassociator (# F (id₁ a)) (# F (id₁ a)) aa
            • ((psfunctor_comp F (id₁ a) (id₁ a) ▹ aa)
               • ((## F (lunitor (id₁ a)) ▹ aa)
                  • (((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ aa)
                     • lunitor aa))))))) =
rinvunitor bb
• ((bb ◃ linvunitor (id₁ a))
   • (lassociator bb (id₁ a) (id₁ a)
      • ((disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
            (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a)
            (pr12 x) ▹ id₁ a)
         • (rassociator
              (# F
                 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                    (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity
                       a))) aa (id₁ a)
            • ((# F (id₁ a) ◃ runitor aa)
               • (((psfunctor_id F a) ^-1 ▹ aa)
                  • lunitor aa))))))

     • (## F (lunitor (id₁ a)) ▹ aa))
    • (((pr122 F) a) ^-1 ▹ aa)) • lunitor aa) = id₂ aa

  • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) a ▹ aa)),,

      (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor aa))
   (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker aa ((pr122 F) a)))

rinvunitor aa

           • lassociator aa (id₁ a) (id₁ a))

  (internal_adjunction_data_identity a) (pr12 x): alg_disp_cat_2cell a a (id₁ a · id₁ a) (id₁ a)
  (lunitor (id₁ a)) bb bb
  ((((((lassociator bb (id₁ a) (id₁ a)
        • (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (internal_adjunction_data_identity a)
             (pr12 x) ▹ id₁ a))

   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
           (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
              (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
                 (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                    bb (id₁ a) (id₁ a))
                 (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                    (id₁ a)
                    (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                       (internal_adjunction_data_identity
                          a) (pr12 x))))
              (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
                 (# F (id₁ a)) aa (id₁ a)))
           (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
              (# F (id₁ a)) (pr1 x)))
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
           (# F (id₁ a)) (# F (id₁ a)) bb))
     (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker bb
        ((pr222 F) a a a (id₁ a) (id₁ a))))
  (((runitor bb • linvunitor bb)
    • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) a ▹ bb)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_runitor bb)
        (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor bb))
     (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker bb
        ((pr122 F) a)))
rinvunitor bb
• ((bb ◃ linvunitor (id₁ a))
   • ((((((((lassociator bb (id₁ a) (id₁ a)
             • (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                  (internal_adjunction_data_identity a)

   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_runitor bb)
        (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor bb))
     (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker bb

 is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
   (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
      (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
         (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
            (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
               (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
                  bb (id₁ a) (id₁ a))
               (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
                  (id₁ a)
                  (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
                     (internal_adjunction_data_identity
                        a) (pr12 x))))
            (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator
               (# F (id₁ a)) aa (id₁ a)))
         (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
            (# F (id₁ a)) (pr1 x)))
      (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator
         (# F (id₁ a)) (# F (id₁ a)) bb))
   (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker bb
      ((pr222 F) a a a (id₁ a) (id₁ a))))
• (## F (lunitor (id₁ a)) ▹ bb)
rinvunitor bb

        • (## F (lunitor (id₁ a)) ▹ bb))
       • (((pr122 F) a) ^-1 ▹ bb)) • lunitor bb)) = 
?b

x: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a) aa bb
t1: (((bb ◃ lunitor (id₁ a)) • runitor bb)
 • linvunitor bb) • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) a ▹ bb) =
(((((lassociator bb (id₁ a) (id₁ a)
     • (disp_left_adjoint_right_adjoint
          (internal_adjunction_data_identity a)
          (pr12 x) ▹ id₁ a))
    • rassociator (# F (id₁ a)) aa (id₁ a))
   • (# F (id₁ a) ◃ pr1 x))
  • lassociator (# F (id₁ a)) (# F (id₁ a)) bb)
 • ((pr222 (pr1 F)) a a a (id₁ a) (id₁ a) ▹ bb))
• (## F (lunitor (id₁ a)) ▹ bb)
?b = id₂ bb

(λ φ : bb ==> aa,

a: C

 exact inv_map_alg.
    Defined.
  End DispAdjointEquivalenceToInvertible2cell.

C: bicat

HC: is_univalent_2_1 C

  (disp_alg_bicat_adjoint_equivalence aa bb x) = pr1 x

          abstract (rewrite invertible_2cell_map_alg_eq2 ;
                    unfold invertible_2cell_map_alg'' ; cbn ; unfold left_adjoint_2cell ;
                    rewrite !vassocr ;
                    rewrite rinvunitor_runitor, id2_left ;
                    rewrite !vassocl ;
                    rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • (_ • z)) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
                    rewrite rwhisker_vcomp, vcomp_rinv ;
                    rewrite id2_rwhisker, id2_left ;
                    rewrite linvunitor_lunitor, id2_right ;
                    reflexivity).

F: psfunctor C C
HC: is_univalent_2_1 C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a) aa bb
(((runitor aa
   • disp_alg_bicat_adjoint_equivalence_inv aa bb x)
  • linvunitor bb) • (psfunctor_id F a ▹ bb)),,
is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_runitor aa)
        (disp_alg_bicat_adjoint_equivalence_inv aa bb
           x)) (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor bb))
  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker bb (psfunctor_id F a)) =
pr1 x

x: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a) aa bb

is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_runitor aa)
        (invertible_2cell_inv_alg aa bb x,,
         map_inv_alg aa bb x,, inv_map_alg aa bb x))
     (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor bb))
  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker bb ((pr122 F) a)) =
pr1 x

pr1

     • linvunitor bb) • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) a ▹ bb)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp

           (is_invertible_2cell_runitor aa)

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
HC: is_univalent_2_1 C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a
x: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity a) aa bb
((runitor aa • invertible_2cell_map_alg aa bb x)
 • linvunitor bb) • ((pr122 (pr1 F)) a ▹ bb) = pr11 x

          abstract (rewrite invertible_2cell_map_alg_eq2 ;
                    unfold invertible_2cell_map_alg'' ; cbn ; unfold left_adjoint_2cell ;
                    rewrite !vassocr ;
                    rewrite runitor_rinvunitor, id2_left ;
                    rewrite !vassocl ;
                    rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • (_ • z)) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
                    rewrite lunitor_linvunitor, id2_left ;
                    rewrite rwhisker_vcomp, vcomp_linv ;
                    rewrite id2_rwhisker, id2_right ;
                    reflexivity).
  Defined.

C: bicat

HC: is_univalent_2_1 C
a: C
aa, bb: disp_alg_bicat a

  aa = bb
(disp_alg_bicat_adjoint_equivalence_weq HC aa bb
 ∘ (idtoiso_2_1 aa bb,, HC (F a) a aa bb))%weq p =
disp_idtoiso_2_0 disp_alg_bicat (idpath a) aa bb p

C: bicat
F: psfunctor C C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: disp_alg_bicat a
bb: disp_alg_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx

    apply disp_alg_bicat_disp_is_invertible_2cell.
  Qed.

End Algebra.
